isi.lyrics:
Lyric Hearts2Hearts - Pretty Please

Romanization

Girls, you ready?
We’ve been waiting for this time,
for so long
Baby come and get the
pretty please yuh,
please you
It’s time to show what we got
Everybody sing it,
PRETTY PLEASE!

igeon machi Perfect timing
geunyang neomgigien yeppeun haetsalkkaji
gomin eopsi georeo Call
da moyeo yeogi Besties
beolsseo na dugeundae

Oh gabange neoeonoeun Polaroid
jillil teum eomneun Playlist
jumbineun wambyeokhae
neon eottae gibuni
Feels so good
cheoeum bal daneun gosirado
It’s okay
neowa hamkke

How it’s so simple
i modeun ge Favorite scenes
Everybody sing it,
PRETTY PLEASE!

I’ll be your
Pretty Pretty Please
chaja urimanui Place
eodideun dallyeogallae
neoui son kkok jabeun chae
Go with flows, the vibe
uri Story
Follow me now
Pre, Pretty Please on me
Pre, Pretty Please on you

konnorae Like
Sing it la ta ta ta
saenggageun Less mami ganeun daero
natseon georirado
gunggeumhae tto nan
Check check hago sipeo

On and on gibuneun Up
eodiro More gabolkka deo
banjjagineun nunggwa maeumeun
Poppin’ poppin’
mandeullae neowa hamkke uri pinalle
We lookin’ pretty good
Pretty okay just like this

How it’s so simple
i modeun ge Favorite scenes
Everybody sing it,
PRETTY PLEASE!

I’ll be your
Pretty Pretty Please
chaja urimanui Place
eodideun dallyeogallae
neoui son kkok jabeun chae
Go with flows, the vibe
uri Story
Follow me now
Pre, Pretty Please on me
Pre, Pretty Please on you

Take it, take my love
See ya
Smiling to me geo bwa
urin hamkkeil ttae deo bitna
cheoeum mannaneun sesangi keo boyeodo
hamkkeramyeon I’m the,
I’m the, I’m the winner

Well sasil
mokjeokjineun jungyohaji
aneun geoljido molla Ay
idaero wambyeokhae
seolleneun mam i sunggan
da meomchwojwo It’s true
Yeah you’re my own
Pretty Please now
Hope you feel the same

I’ll be your Pretty Pretty Please
chaja urimanui Place
eodideun dallyeogallae
neoui son kkok jabeun chae
Go with flows, the vibe
uri Story
Follow me now
Pre, Pretty Please on me
Pre, Pretty Please on you

I’ll be your Pretty Pretty Please
Every step by step
saerowo New day
I’ll be your Pretty Pretty Please
Show me your pretty world
We are on the way
Let’s go with vibes
uri Story
Follow me now
Pre, Pretty Please on me
Pre, Pretty Please on you

Hangeul

Girls, you ready?
We’ve been waiting for this time,
for so long
Baby come and get the
pretty please yuh,
please you
It’s time to show what we got
Everybody sing it,
PRETTY PLEASE!

고민 없이 걸어 Call

낯선 거리라도
궁금해 또 난

함께라면 I’m the,
